[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Yorta''' a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Rendezvous" /> He was a major executive of [[Red Star Shipping Lines]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> Yorta had a son named [[Raal Yorta|Raal]].<ref name="Rendezvous" />
